name: openclaw
description: Multi-channel AI gateway with extensible messaging integrations

scripts.android:run: cd apps/android && ./gradlew :app:installPlayDebug && adb shell am start -n ai.openclaw.app/.MainActivity
scripts.android:run:third-party: cd apps/android && ./gradlew :app:installThirdPartyDebug && adb shell am start -n ai.openclaw.app/.MainActivity
scripts.android:test:integration: OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_ANDROID_NODE=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts src/gateway/android-node.capabilities.live.test.ts
scripts.build:docker: node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs && node scripts/check-cli-bootstrap-imports.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && node scripts/build-stamp.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.mjs && node --import tsx scripts/canvas-a2ui-copy.ts && node --import tsx scripts/copy-hook-metadata.ts && node --import tsx scripts/copy-export-html-templates.ts && node --import tsx scripts/write-build-info.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/write-cli-startup-metadata.ts && node --import tsx scripts/write-cli-compat.ts
scripts.build:strict-smoke: pnpm canvas:a2ui:bundle && node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs && node scripts/check-cli-bootstrap-imports.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && node scripts/build-stamp.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.mjs && pnpm build:plugin-sdk:dts && node --import tsx scripts/write-plugin-sdk-entry-dts.ts && node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-exports.mjs
scripts.capital-hft:qmd:import:2025: node scripts/openclaw-qmd-importer.mjs --import --qmd "D:/群益及元大API/群益2025內外期歷史資料包/群益 2025 內外期歷史資料包.qmd" --symbol TXF --out-dir ".openclaw/bars/qmd-2025"
scripts.capital-hft:qmd:import:domestic: node scripts/openclaw-qmd-importer.mjs --import --qmd "D:/群益及元大API/群益國內三年歷史資料包x64_202508/國內三年歷史資料包/群益MC12x64內期歷史資料包_20241212.qmd" --symbol TXF --out-dir ".openclaw/bars/qmd-domestic"
scripts.capital:trade:direct:check: node scripts/openclaw-capital-live-order-dry-run-pretrade-gate.mjs --check --json && node scripts/check-capital-live-order-dry-run-pretrade-gate.mjs && node scripts/check-openclaw-broker-adapter-contract.mjs --json && pnpm capital-hft:hft-broker-dispatcher:check && pnpm capital:live-trading:operator:auto-deactivate:receipt:check && pnpm capital:trade:direct:status:check && pnpm capital:trade:position-snapshot-refresh:check && pnpm capital:trade:direct:inputs:check && pnpm capital:trade:adapter-ack:check && pnpm capital:trade:adapter-ack-handoff:check && pnpm capital:trade:adapter-ack-refresh-packet:check && pnpm capital:trade:adapter-ack-apply-verifier:check && pnpm capital:trade:adapter-ack-apply-plan:check && pnpm capital:trade:adapter-ack-apply-receipt:check && pnpm capital:trade:live-executor-profile:check && pnpm capital:trade:operator-packet:check && pnpm capital:trade:local-executor-dispatch:check && pnpm capital:trade:post-apply-closure:check
scripts.check:architecture: pnpm check:import-cycles && pnpm check:madge-import-cycles && pnpm check:deprecated-internal-config-api && pnpm check:deprecated-jsdoc
scripts.check:docs: pnpm format:docs:check && pnpm lint:docs && pnpm docs:check-mdx && pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary && pnpm docs:check-links
scripts.deadcode:report: pnpm deadcode:knip; pnpm deadcode:ts-prune; pnpm deadcode:ts-unused
scripts.deadcode:ts-prune: pnpm dlx ts-prune src extensions scripts
scripts.dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:gate:self-te: pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:verify:self-test && pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:verify:full:self-test && pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:verify:strict:self-test && pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:verify:gate:self-test && pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:verify:gate:full:self-test && pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:gate:self-test && pnpm dmad:run-test:timeout-smoke:gate:full:self-test
scripts.ios:build: bash -lc './scripts/ios-configure-signing.sh && ./scripts/ios-write-version-xcconfig.sh && cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project OpenClaw.xcodeproj -scheme OpenClaw -destination "${IOS_DEST:-platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17}" -configuration Debug build'
scripts.ios:open: bash -lc './scripts/ios-configure-signing.sh && ./scripts/ios-write-version-xcconfig.sh && cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && open OpenClaw.xcodeproj'
scripts.ios:run: bash -lc './scripts/ios-configure-signing.sh && ./scripts/ios-write-version-xcconfig.sh && cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project OpenClaw.xcodeproj -scheme OpenClaw -destination "${IOS_DEST:-platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17}" -configuration Debug build && xcrun simctl boot "${IOS_SIM:-iPhone 17}" || true && xcrun simctl launch booted ai.openclaw.ios'
scripts.lint:core: node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src ui packages
scripts.lint:scripts: pnpm lint:docker-e2e && pnpm lint:tmp:no-raw-http2-imports && node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts
scripts.lint:swift: swiftlint lint --config config/swiftlint.yml && (cd apps/ios && swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml)
scripts.prepare: command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath git-hooks || exit 0
scripts.protocol:check: pnpm protocol:gen && pnpm protocol:gen:swift && git diff --exit-code -- dist/protocol.schema.json apps/macos/Sources/OpenClawProtocol/GatewayModels.swift apps/shared/OpenClawKit/Sources/OpenClawProtocol/GatewayModels.swift
scripts.proxy:gateway: node scripts/run-node.mjs proxy run -- node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway
scripts.qmd:import-2025: node scripts/openclaw-qmd-importer.mjs --import --symbol TXF --qmd "D:/群益及元大API/群益2025行情包-2024-2025/群益MC12x64行情包_20250101_20251220.qmd" --out .openclaw/bars/qmd-2025-clean
scripts.qmd:import-domestic: node scripts/openclaw-qmd-importer.mjs --import --symbol TXF --qmd "D:/群益及元大API/群益國內三年歷史資料包x64_202508/國內三年歷史資料包/群益MC12x64內期歷史資料包_20241212.qmd" --out .openclaw/bars/qmd-domestic-clean
scripts.qmd:probe-2025: node scripts/openclaw-qmd-importer.mjs --probe --qmd "D:/群益及元大API/群益2025行情包-2024-2025/群益MC12x64行情包_20250101_20251220.qmd"
scripts.qmd:probe-domestic: node scripts/openclaw-qmd-importer.mjs --probe --qmd "D:/群益及元大API/群益國內三年歷史資料包x64_202508/國內三年歷史資料包/群益MC12x64內期歷史資料包_20241212.qmd"
scripts.release:check: pnpm deps:root-ownership:check && pnpm plugins:inventory:check && pnpm check:base-config-schema && pnpm check:bundled-channel-config-metadata && pnpm config:docs:check && pnpm plugin-sdk:check-exports && pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check && node --import tsx scripts/release-check.ts
scripts.test:all: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:live && pnpm test:docker:all
scripts.test:auth:compat: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.auth.compat-baseline.test.ts src/gateway/client.test.ts src/gateway/reconnect-gating.test.ts src/gateway/protocol/connect-error-details.test.ts
scripts.test:macos:ci: node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/daemon/launchd.test.ts src/daemon/runtime-paths.test.ts src/daemon/runtime-binary.test.ts src/infra/brew.test.ts src/infra/stable-node-path.test.ts test/scripts/vitest-process-group.test.ts
scripts.test:never-stuck: pnpm run test:dev-task-runner && pnpm run test:git-worktree-pool
scripts.test:plugins:kitchen-sink-live: bash -lc 'if [ -x "$HOME/.local/bin/openclaw-testbox-env" ]; then exec "$HOME/.local/bin/openclaw-testbox-env" pnpm openclaw qa suite --provider-mode live-frontier --scenario kitchen-sink-live-openai; fi; exec pnpm openclaw qa suite --provider-mode live-frontier --scenario kitchen-sink-live-openai'
scripts.test:sectriage: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PROJECT_SHARDS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts --exclude src/daemon/launchd.integration.test.ts --exclude src/process/exec.test.ts
scripts.test:stability:gateway: OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/gateway-stability.test.ts && OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.logging.config.ts src/logging/diagnostic-stability-bundle.test.ts && OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/fatal-error-hooks.test.ts
scripts.test:ui: pnpm ui:i18n:check && pnpm lint:ui:no-raw-window-open && pnpm --dir ui test
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:unit:fast && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts
scripts.test:windows:ci: node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/shared/runtime-import.test.ts src/plugins/import-specifier.test.ts src/process/exec.windows.test.ts src/process/windows-command.test.ts src/infra/windows-install-roots.test.ts extensions/lobster/src/lobster-runner.test.ts test/scripts/npm-runner.test.ts test/scripts/pnpm-runner.test.ts test/scripts/ui.test.ts test/scripts/vitest-process-group.test.ts
scripts.trading:runtime:autocheck: pnpm capital:service-status:check && pnpm tradingagents:runtime:status && pnpm okx:current-readiness:check
scripts.tradingagents:status:verbose: pnpm tradingagents:integration:check && pnpm tradingagents:runtime:status && pnpm tradingagents:upstream:status
